subcodes.first_line: O Luminous One! The luminaries are divided into several kinds: one hath a body dark and obscure, yet deriveth its light from another [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منیر نیرات بر چند قسم منقسم یکی جرمش مظلم و تاریک ولی اقتباس نور از غیر
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism of color and light, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
